title: Agent discovery tier structure
context: Per AX-001 uniformity, agent discovery should apply uniformly to all agents regardless of consumer. Per DEC-0003, .pi/ is not part of any tier.
decision: Three-tier search, first match wins: (1) resolveContextDir(cwd)/agents/ — project-level overrides (substrate-tracked); (2) ~/.pi/agent/agents/ — user-global overrides (Pi home convention); (3) consumer-package/agents/ — builtins. Per AX-001 this single tier structure applies to all agents regardless of which consumer invokes them. Per DEC-0003 none of these tiers touch .pi/.
consequences: Per AX-002 most existing builtin agents are disposable; what ships as a builtin must earn its place
Agents authored at project level have natural access to project state via contextBlocks (substrate-tracked path matches substrate-tracked blocks)
Framework package has no agents/ directory (DEC-0002 corollary)
